title: Senior Software Engineer
salaryInsight: Mid-to-senior software engineering roles in Gauteng often range from R50,000 to R85,000 monthly depending on cloud and leadership exposure.
description: Vanguard Tech is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to design and maintain secure web products used by banks, insurers and public-sector clients in South Africa. You will guide architecture decisions, mentor junior developers, and improve deployment reliability across multiple production environments. The role combines hands-on coding, code reviews, collaboration with product managers, and DevOps ownership. This is suitable for professionals who enjoy solving scale, performance and security challenges while building software with measurable social and economic impact.
requirements: South African work eligibility
5+ years in full-stack or backend engineering
Strong JavaScript/TypeScript and modern frameworks
Experience with cloud hosting, CI/CD and automated testing
Ability to mentor junior developers and communicate with non-technical stakeholders
applicationProcess: Prepare an updated CV, a short project portfolio link, and two professional references. Submit through the official careers page. Shortlisted candidates complete a technical assessment, followed by a panel interview and final culture-fit discussion.
tips: Tailor your CV to highlight measurable project outcomes (performance, uptime, cost savings).
Show evidence of system design thinking, not only coding tasks.
Include links to GitHub, technical writing, or production projects where possible.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
salaryInsight: Digital marketing specialists in Cape Town commonly earn between R24,000 and R45,000 monthly based on channel ownership and analytics depth.
description: Wave Media Group seeks a Digital Marketing Specialist to run SEO, paid media and content growth campaigns for retail and education clients. You will coordinate campaign calendars, optimize landing pages, and report ROI across Google Ads and social channels. The role requires strong analytical ability, copy direction and collaboration with designers and developers. Candidates with experience in local South African audiences and multilingual campaign adaptation will be highly competitive.
requirements: South African work eligibility
3+ years in digital marketing or performance marketing
Hands-on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager
Working knowledge of SEO and conversion optimization
Comfort using analytics tools and dashboard reporting
applicationProcess: Complete the online application with CV and campaign case studies. Include one campaign where you improved conversion rate or lowered CPA. Shortlisted applicants complete a practical assignment and a final interview with the growth lead.
tips: Include budget size, CTR, CPC and conversion improvements in your CV bullets.
Share before-and-after examples of landing page optimization.
Demonstrate understanding of compliance for financial or education advertising.

title: Financial Analyst
salaryInsight: Financial analyst roles in Sandton typically sit between R30,000 and R60,000 monthly depending on modelling skills and sector specialization.
description: Ubuntu Capital Partners is recruiting a Financial Analyst to support valuation, budgeting and forecasting work for corporate advisory projects. The analyst will build financial models, prepare board-ready reports and assist investment committees with scenario analysis. This opportunity suits detail-oriented graduates and early-career professionals who want strong exposure to South African corporate finance and deal environments.
requirements: South African citizen or valid work authorization
BCom Finance, Accounting or Economics
2+ years in FP&A, audit, banking or corporate finance
Advanced Excel and financial modelling capability
Strong written communication for executive summaries
applicationProcess: Submit CV, academic transcripts and a short motivation letter via the company portal. Candidates may be asked to complete a timed modelling exercise before interviews. Final selection includes reference checks and offer discussion.
tips: Show technical skills clearly: DCF, sensitivity analysis, budgeting and forecasting.
Mention industries you have analysed (banking, mining, telecoms, etc.).
Keep CV formatting clean and quantify impact in each role.

title: UX/UI Designer
salaryInsight: Contract UX/UI design rates vary, but experienced product designers in South Africa often earn equivalent monthly income between R28,000 and R55,000.
description: Pixel Forge Studio needs a UX/UI Designer for a 12-month contract focused on redesigning web and mobile products for logistics and healthcare clients. You will conduct user research, design flows and prototypes, and collaborate closely with engineers to ship consistent interfaces. The team values accessibility-first design and practical design systems that reduce development rework.
requirements: Portfolio with live product work
3+ years UX/UI experience
Proficiency in Figma and prototyping workflows
Experience with usability testing and accessibility standards
Ability to work with cross-functional teams and deadlines
applicationProcess: Apply with CV and portfolio link. Clearly label your role in each project. Shortlisted candidates complete a paid design exercise and present a short walkthrough to the hiring panel.
tips: Include the business problem, design approach and final impact in your portfolio case studies.
Show evidence of handoff quality (tokens, components, specs).
Demonstrate accessibility knowledge with practical examples.

title: Customer Success Executive
salaryInsight: Customer success roles in SaaS businesses in South Africa generally range from R20,000 to R38,000 monthly based on account size and retention KPIs.
description: CloudBase CRM is looking for a Customer Success Executive to onboard new clients, improve product adoption and reduce churn in the SME segment. The role combines client training, account health monitoring and escalation management. You will work with support and product teams to resolve recurring issues and improve customer outcomes.
requirements: South African work eligibility
2+ years in customer success, account management or support
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
Experience with CRM tools and reporting dashboards
Comfort with targets such as retention, expansion and NPS
applicationProcess: Send your CV and a short note describing your customer retention achievements. Shortlisted candidates attend a role-play interview based on a client onboarding scenario, followed by a team interview.
tips: Highlight measurable retention or upsell outcomes in previous roles.
Use examples of difficult customer situations you resolved professionally.
Demonstrate product knowledge learning speed and empathy.

title: Data Scientist
location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
salaryInsight: Data scientist salaries in major South African metros often range from R45,000 to R90,000 monthly depending on Python, ML and deployment experience.
description: Mzanzi Insights Lab is hiring a Data Scientist to build forecasting and classification models for retail and public services datasets. You will clean and model large datasets, validate model performance and communicate insights to non-technical decision-makers. The role includes experimentation, dashboard collaboration and production model monitoring.
requirements: Degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science or related field
3+ years in analytics or data science roles
Strong Python, SQL and statistical modelling knowledge
Experience with model validation and bias checks
Ability to explain insights clearly to business users
applicationProcess: Apply online with CV, portfolio/notebook links and a brief motivation. Candidates complete a take-home technical task and present findings in a final interview round.
tips: Include projects that moved beyond exploration into deployment or business decisions.
Show how you handled data quality issues and stakeholder expectations.
Document tools used, metrics improved and decision impact.

title: Enterprise Sales Manager
salaryInsight: Enterprise sales managers in telecom and SaaS often combine a base of R40,000–R70,000 with variable commission tied to quota achievement.
description: Nexus Telecom SA requires an Enterprise Sales Manager to grow B2B accounts across Gauteng and KwaZulu-Natal. You will lead consultative sales cycles, negotiate enterprise contracts and coordinate implementation handovers. This role is ideal for candidates with strong pipeline discipline and experience closing multi-stakeholder deals.
requirements: 5+ years B2B sales experience with enterprise clients
Proven track record of meeting or exceeding quota
Excellent negotiation and proposal-writing skills
Understanding of telecom or cloud solutions preferred
Valid South African driver’s licence and willingness to travel
applicationProcess: Submit CV and a brief sales achievement summary through the careers portal. Qualified applicants complete a panel interview and present a sample account plan for a target client segment.
tips: Quantify revenue closed, average deal size and renewal outcomes.
Show your methodology for pipeline management and forecasting accuracy.
Demonstrate collaboration with delivery and customer success teams.

title: HR Business Partner
location: East London, Eastern Cape, South Africa
salaryInsight: HR business partner compensation in manufacturing sectors typically ranges between R35,000 and R60,000 monthly based on union and compliance exposure.
description: Imbokodo Manufacturing is searching for an HR Business Partner to support workforce planning, labour relations and performance management at plant level. The role involves policy implementation, employee relations case handling and coaching line managers on fair people practices. Experience in labour law compliance and high-volume operations is valuable.
requirements: Relevant HR qualification
4+ years HR generalist or HRBP experience
Knowledge of South African labour legislation and CCMA processes
Strong conflict resolution and facilitation skills
Experience in industrial or manufacturing settings preferred
applicationProcess: Upload CV and qualifications to the official hiring portal. The process includes HR screening, panel interviews and reference verification. Final candidates may complete a scenario-based assessment on labour relations.
tips: Emphasize labour law and disciplinary process experience clearly.
Provide examples where HR interventions improved retention or absenteeism.
Show your ability to partner with operations teams, not only HR teams.

title: Junior Content Creator
salaryInsight: Entry-level content creator roles commonly range from R12,000 to R25,000 monthly depending on editing, scripting and platform performance results.
description: Rise Digital Africa is hiring a Junior Content Creator to support social campaigns, video scripts and blog production for youth-focused brands. You will research trends, draft content calendars and work with designers to deliver platform-ready assets. This role suits applicants with strong writing skills and willingness to learn analytics-driven content strategy.
requirements: Portfolio of writing, social posts or short-form video work
1+ year internship, freelance or junior content experience
Basic design/video editing familiarity
Strong grammar and storytelling ability
Understanding of platform trends and audience behavior
applicationProcess: Apply with CV, portfolio links and a short motivation explaining your content interests. Selected applicants complete a practical test involving content planning for one week across multiple platforms.
tips: Share links to your best performing content and explain why it worked.
Demonstrate reliability with deadlines and collaborative feedback.
Use ATS-friendly CV keywords: copywriting, social media, SEO, analytics.

title: IT Support Technician
salaryInsight: IT support technician salaries in regional South African markets often range from R16,000 to R30,000 monthly depending on certifications and shift coverage.
description: AfriNet Systems is recruiting an IT Support Technician to provide first- and second-line support for desktops, networks and cloud tools across branch offices. Duties include troubleshooting, user onboarding, hardware setup and ticket resolution within SLA. Candidates with strong customer service and practical networking skills are encouraged to apply.
requirements: NQF-aligned IT certificate, diploma or equivalent practical experience
1–3 years helpdesk or desktop support experience
Familiarity with Windows, Microsoft 365 and basic networking
Ability to diagnose and document incidents clearly
Valid driver’s licence is advantageous
applicationProcess: Submit CV and certifications through the careers page. Shortlisted candidates complete a practical troubleshooting assessment and attend an interview with IT operations leads.
tips: List ticketing systems and SLA metrics you have worked with.
Mention certifications such as CompTIA A+, N+, or Microsoft fundamentals.
Prepare examples of difficult issues you solved end-to-end.
